templates.name: Fiction Launch
templates.description: Complete checklist for launching a fiction book

tasks.name: Finalize book cover
tasks.description: Get final approval on cover design from designer or beta readers

tasks.name: Send to ARC readers
tasks.description: Distribute Advanced Reader Copies to beta readers and influencers

tasks.name: Collect testimonials
tasks.description: Gather quotes and reviews from ARC readers

tasks.name: Create cover reveal post
tasks.description: Design and schedule cover reveal on social media

tasks.name: Set up pre-order links
tasks.description: Configure pre-order links on Amazon, Apple Books, and other platforms

tasks.name: Write launch day social posts
tasks.description: Create 5-10 social media posts for launch day

tasks.name: Email list announcement
tasks.description: Send announcement email to your mailing list

tasks.name: Final promo push
tasks.description: Last-minute promotion on all channels

tasks.name: Launch day blitz
tasks.description: Post on social media, engage with readers, monitor sales

tasks.name: Post-launch follow-up
tasks.description: Send thank you emails, share reviews, plan next steps

templates.name: Minimal Launch

tasks.name: Finalize book
tasks.description: Final proofread and formatting

tasks.name: Set up sales links
tasks.description: Configure links on all platforms

tasks.name: Announce to email list
tasks.description: Send launch announcement

tasks.name: Social media posts
tasks.description: Post on social media

tasks.name: Launch day
tasks.description: Monitor sales and engage with readers

templates.name: Non-Fiction Launch
templates.description: Checklist for launching a non-fiction book

tasks.name: Finalize manuscript
tasks.description: Complete final edits and formatting

tasks.name: Send to beta readers
tasks.description: Distribute to beta readers for feedback

tasks.name: Collect testimonials
tasks.description: Get endorsements from experts in your field

tasks.name: Create media kit
tasks.description: Prepare press release and media materials

tasks.name: Pitch to media
tasks.description: Send pitches to podcasts, blogs, and publications

tasks.name: Set up pre-orders
tasks.description: Enable pre-orders on all platforms

tasks.name: Create launch content
tasks.description: Write blog posts, social content, email sequences

tasks.name: Final promotion
tasks.description: Last push before launch

tasks.name: Launch day
tasks.description: Go live and monitor

tasks.name: Follow-up outreach
tasks.description: Thank reviewers, share results
